title: About
intro: ValorForge Solutions is a Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business (SDVOSB) delivering federal broadband program management, AI governance, cybersecurity, and consulting excellence with an unrelenting focus on mission outcomes.
achievements: Led broadband availability data operations and Fabric challenge management for a Tier 1 national carrier — one of the largest BDC filers in the country
Drove national-scale geospatial dataset development for broadband infrastructure programs serving hundreds of millions of locations
Executed telecom topology mapping at national scale on Palantir Foundry, creating real-time digital-twin visibility across planning, building, operations, and network resilience
Led network disaster planning and resilience initiatives in partnership with NOAA, integrating environmental risk data with telecom infrastructure
Modernized communications supply chains through multimillion-dollar programs for Tier 1 telecom operators
Implemented Generative AI optimizations delivering 15–20% margin gains and up to 50× productivity improvements in key operational workflows
Brings Big Four consulting rigor fused with military-rooted integrity, accountability, and veteran/first responder workforce commitment

cards.title: Mission
cards.body: To forge durable, high-confidence technology outcomes for organizations whose missions cannot fail.

cards.title: Vision Statement
cards.body: A world where mission-led teams confidently harness technology and AI, grounded in trust, discipline, and alignment.

cards.title: Core Values
cards.body: Service, discipline, integrity, and stewardship—applied to every engagement we lead.
